notes: Run chat transcript UX fixes: fixes initial anchoring to the latest message, improves bottom anchoring and jump-to-bottom behavior, and expands tests around chat scroll and anchor behavior.
About modal refresh: simplifies and polishes the About modal layout, updates hierarchy, copy, and presentation, and adjusts support link handling and related tests.
Sidebar polish: fixes sidebar version display wrapping and refreshes the sidebar after creating a new project.
